attack_surface.data_description: Incentive Entitlement Proofs submitted for claim

security_gap.gap_description: Vulnerabilities in the Distributor contract or proof mechanism could allow attackers to claim unearned incentives or fees.

actor_risk.description: User claiming rewards is exposed if the entitlement and claim logic is flawed.

behavioral_risk.rationale: Basic action to claim accrued incentives/fees.

assumptions: The BGTIncentiveDistributor contract or the off-chain proof generation mechanism contains a vulnerability.
An attacker can forge or manipulate claim proofs.

mitigation.strategy: Conduct comprehensive smart contract audits, secure the proof generation process, implement robust proof verification on-chain.

description: An attacker exploits a vulnerability in the BGTIncentiveDistributor contract or the incentive proof mechanism to claim incentive tokens or fees they are not entitled to.
